description:
This intermediate to advanced PostgreSQL quiz tests knowledge of both common and obscure features, including built-in aggregates, type casting, and constraints, with a friendly, engaging tone that encourages learning through challenges.
Topics: Built-in aggregates, Type casting, Constraints, PostgreSQL features, Gotchas and edge cases
Audience: Developers and database administrators with existing PostgreSQL experience seeking to deepen their expertise and troubleshoot complex scenarios.
